privileged_info_summary: The task uses real flower photographs from Unsplash (photo IDs 1441974231531-c6227db76b6e and 1578662996442-48f60103fc96), both 800x533 JPEG images. The task requires creating an elliptical selection and applying an 8-pixel red (#FF0000) stroke outline. The verifier validates the presence of red stroke pixels (tolerance 50), elliptical pattern detection, centered positioning, stroke width between 4-20 pixels, and at least 100 new red pixels. The exported result is saved as flower_stroke.jpg. All specifications are consistent across task.json, setup scripts, and verifier logic.
audit_notes: No explicit 'metadata' field exists in task.json. All verified claims come from the task description, setup scripts, and verifier code. All claims about stroke width, color, selection type, and data source have been independently verified.
